spec.description: Wireless network health: connection stats, RF/channel utilization, data rates, SSID client distribution, Bluetooth detection.
F-152 fix: meraki_network_wireless_connection_stats_count is a 30-minute-window gauge (assoc/auth/dhcp/dns/success) — rendered directly, NOT wrapped in rate()/increase().
spec.title: Wireless connection funnel (30-min window)

spec.description: Already a bytes/second rate emitted by the exporter — no rate()/increase() needed.
spec.title: Wireless throughput

spec.description: meraki_mr_packets_{count,lost_count} are 5-minute-window gauges — ratio computed directly from the two gauges, no rate().
spec.title: Packet loss — per AP (5-min window, %)

spec.expr: ((meraki_mr_network_packets_lost_count{job="meraki_dashboard", org_id=~"$organization", network_id=~"$network"} / clamp_min(meraki_mr_network_packets_count{job="meraki_dashboard", org_id=~"$organization", network_id=~"$network"}, 1)) * 100) * on(network_id) group_left(network_name) meraki_network_info{job="meraki_dashboard"}

spec.description: meraki_clients_per_ssid_count, 1-hour-window gauge (includes the synthetic 'Wired' pseudo-SSID Meraki reports for AP-attached wired clients).
spec.title: Clients per SSID

spec.description: Count of foreign SSIDs seen by Air Marshal — security-adjacent SSID signal.
spec.title: Rogue/neighboring SSIDs detected (Air Marshal)

spec.expr: (sum(meraki_network_wireless_connection_stats_count{job="meraki_dashboard", org_id=~"$organization", network_id=~"$network", stat_type="success"}) / clamp_min(sum(meraki_network_wireless_connection_stats_count{job="meraki_dashboard", org_id=~"$organization", network_id=~"$network", stat_type="assoc"}), 1)) * 100

spec.description: success / assoc * 100, from the same 30-min-window gauge, no rate().
spec.title: Connection success rate (%)

spec.description: Same windowed-gauge family as a table, one row per network/stat_type.
spec.title: Connection funnel by network (table)

spec.description: Network-wide 10-min bucket average, 2.4GHz vs 5GHz (utilization_type=total; this metric also carries wifi/non_wifi breakdowns like its per-AP sibling).
spec.title: Network-wide avg channel utilization

spec.description: 6GHz radio family exists in the exporter (added #271) but NEITHER live org currently has a 6GHz-capable AP reporting — expect No data until a 6E/7 AP is deployed.
spec.title: 6GHz channel utilization (AP)

spec.description: Config info: which RF profile each AP is using.
spec.title: RF profile assignment (table)
Meraki – Network Health
